inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.importHint: Import new documents to start building your knowledge base

import.title: Import
import.description: Upload and import new documents into your knowledge base.
import.dragDropHint: Drag and drop PDF files here, or click to browse
import.webClipHint: Paste a URL to clip web content and save it to your knowledge base.
import.rssHint: Subscribe to RSS feeds to automatically import new articles.
import.errorOnlyPdf: Only PDF files are supported for drag and drop upload
import.errorWebClipNotImplemented: Web clipping is not yet implemented. Please use PDF upload.
import.errorRssNotImplemented: RSS feed management is not yet implemented. This is a placeholder.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageHint: Select your preferred display language for the interface.
